The Future of Web Design

Web design has come full circle. After years of increasingly complex build tools, we're seeing a resurgence of simplicity.

This is where semantic HTML shines. By using the right elements for the right purposes, we create inherently accessible documents.

The Problem with Classes

Utility-first CSS frameworks have dominated, but at what cost? HTML becomes unreadable.

The benefits are clear:

  • Cleaner markup
  • Smaller bundles
  • Better accessibility

The future is semantic, minimal, and intelligent.
